impact: Comment in src/types/build-constants.d.ts says identifier 'will read undefined at runtime' while the declared type is `string`. Factually correct for misconfigured build but mildly confusing inside the .d.ts. Triple-covered by version-drift.test.ts (not.toBeUndefined, not.toBe '0.0.0', toBe pkg.version).
resolution: Closed as wontfix. Independent review confirmed the comment in src/types/build-constants.d.ts is factually correct documentation of the failure mode when tsup's `define` is absent, not a misstatement about the deployed path. Triple-coverage by version-drift.test.ts (noted in the issue itself) already pins that the replacement is wired. No code change needed.
title: [comment-accuracy] Comment in src/types/build-constants.d.ts says identifier 'will read undefined a
